title: In The Ember Days Of My Last Free Summer
content:
In the ember days of my last free summer,
here I lie, outside myself, watching
the gross body eating a poor curry:
satisfied at what I have done, scared of what
I have to do in my last free winter.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Ben Jonson, titled "In The Ember Days Of My Last Free Summer", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
